modelIntro.title: Why Seedance 2.0 for AI Video
description: Seedance 2.0 unifies text, image, video, and audio in one pipeline. Mix prompts with up to 9 images, 3 video clips, and 3 audio clips per request. No chaining tools—one input, one output.
Director-level control over lighting, camera, and performance. 15-second 1080p multi-shot with stereo audio. Built for ads, social, and pre-production.
Free online. No sign-up—start from your browser.

intro.title: Why Choose Seedance 2.0 AI Video Generator?

content.title: The Most Comprehensive Multimodal Video AI
content.text: Seedance 2.0 is ByteDance's next-generation AI video model with a unified multimodal architecture. Unlike tools that only accept text, Seedance 2.0 supports text, images (up to 9), video clips (up to 3), and audio clips (up to 3)—all in one generation. Combine natural language with visual and audio references for unprecedented creative control. Describe your scene in words, add reference images for style, include sample footage for consistency, or sync with audio—the AI handles everything in a single pass. This multimodal approach makes Seedance 2.0 the most flexible AI video generator available for free online.

content.title: Professional-Grade Output for Film and Advertising
content.text: Generate 15-second high-quality multi-shot videos with dual-channel audio. Seedance 2.0 excels at complex motions, follows physical laws, and offers director-level control over performance, lighting, shadow, and camera movement. Designed for film, advertising, e-commerce, and gaming production. The model produces Hollywood-quality output suitable for social media, ads, storyboards, and concept previews. Whether you need a product showcase, character animation, or cinematic scene, the AI video generator delivers professional results without expensive production equipment or crews.

content.title: Free Online Access for All Creators
content.text: Toolaze provides free AI video generation with Seedance 2.0 online. No sign-up, no credit card, no usage caps for getting started. Works entirely in your browser—no software installation. Create 1080p videos from text, images, video, and audio in seconds. Download and use your AI-generated videos anywhere. Perfect for content creators, marketers, filmmakers, and anyone who needs to prototype video ideas quickly. The free AI video generator is ready when you are.

faq.q: What is the best free AI video generator?
faq.a: Seedance 2.0 is among the leading AI video models in 2026. Toolaze offers free access online with support for text, image, video, and audio inputs. No sign-up required. Generate 1080p Hollywood-quality videos with director-level control. Other strong options include Sora 2 and Runway—compare based on your needs for resolution, input types, and control level. Seedance 2.0's multimodal capabilities set it apart for creators who want maximum flexibility.

Different strengths. Sora 2: physics accuracy, realism, audio sync, "characters" to insert real people—via Sora app. Seedance 2.0: multimodal input (text + 9 images + 3 video/audio clips), 1080p, director-level control—free on Toolaze. Choose Sora 2 for realism; Seedance 2.0 for multimodal flexibility and free access.

faq.q: Can I use AI video generator without signing up?
faq.a: Yes! Toolaze provides free AI video generation with Seedance 2.0 online. No registration or sign-up required. Start creating videos immediately. Enter your prompts, upload images or other inputs, and generate 1080p videos in seconds. No credit card, no usage caps for getting started. The free tier is sufficient for most creators.

Seedance 2.0 supports four input types: text (natural language prompts), images (up to 9), video clips (up to 3), and audio clips (up to 3). Combine any of these with natural language instructions. Use text alone for conceptual scenes, add images for style reference, include video for consistency, or sync with audio. The multimodal architecture handles all combinations in one generation.

faq.q: Does the AI video generator create audio too?
faq.a: Yes. Seedance 2.0 uses a unified audio-video joint generation architecture. It generates 15-second videos with dual-channel audio simultaneously. You don't need separate tools for video and sound—both are produced in one pass. Add audio clips as reference for even more control over the final output.

faq.q: How long can AI-generated videos be?
faq.a: Seedance 2.0 generates 15-second high-quality multi-shot videos per generation. This length is ideal for social media (TikTok, Reels, Shorts), advertisements, and concept previews. For longer content, create multiple 15-second clips and combine them in video editing software. The model optimizes for quality within this duration.

faq.q: Is the AI video generator free for commercial use?
faq.a: Toolaze offers free AI video generation with Seedance 2.0. Check our terms of service for commercial use rights. The free tier allows you to create and download videos. For high-volume or commercial licensing, review our pricing and terms. Most creators can get started and test the tool at no cost.
